title: Council v2.5 — Positioning & Landing Fix
review_history: v1.1.0 → review 2 → 6 issues (2 CRITICAL, 4 MEDIUM, all introduced by v1.1.0 edits)
v1.2.0 → review 3 (critical-only scope) → CLEAN, 0 critical issues
scope_rule: Landing/hero copy + sample verdict cards + CTA text + pain hook + i18n sync + in-place rename of three existing i18n keys. DO NOT touch verdict API, prompt logic, scoring, backend, or the existing VerdictCard component. If blocked by something outside scope, STOP and report — do not improvise.

changes: N1: Narrowed T0 grep from bare word to regex t\("(headline|subheadline|submit_button)"\) — the broad grep would false-positive on unrelated code (genesis, agents, brief) and trigger the blocker rule falsely.
N2: Fixed TEST-6b same way — was structurally unpassable with bare-word grep because narrative-builder, chapter, brief, and content-writer files all legitimately use 'headline' in non-i18n contexts.
N3: Removed T1's sample-data-in-dict option — T3 is authoritative. Prevents sequential-implementer wasted work.
N4: Extended sessionSubmitted protection to handleNotQuite (page.tsx:224-229) in addition to resetAll. Samples must not reappear after 'Not quite?' button either.
N5: Pain hook may wrap to 2 lines on mobile — 'single line' was physically impossible at 71-80 char content with text-xs at 375px. Removed whitespace-nowrap trap.
N6: AC13 threshold relaxed from ≥200px to ≥190px per card (option A). Corrected T3 math note from ~213px to ~197px — was using max-w-2xl without accounting for px-6 padding.
C1: Rewrote T1 i18n keys to use { en, tr } dict pattern (matches src/lib/i18n.tsx DictKey type)
C2: Picked Option A — rename headline→hero_h1, subheadline→hero_h2, submit_button→hero_cta in-place. Added pre-rename grep task (T0) to catch usages outside page.tsx
C3: Moved SampleVerdicts render location OUTSIDE max-w-lg input wrapper, INSIDE max-w-2xl main column, for card width breathing room
C4: Picked Option A — build minimal <SampleVerdictCard>, do NOT reuse <VerdictCard>. Added task to read verdict-card.tsx for exact style tokens
M1: Added sessionSubmitted state variable spec to T3 and clarified AC6
M2: Changed 'real verdicts' → 'example verdicts' in section subheading (honesty)
M3: Specified H2 keeps existing text-sm muted-foreground; pain hook gets distinct register (uppercase tracking-wide) to avoid hierarchy collapse
M4: Confirmed councilpro.vercel.app is canonical; no metadataBase change needed. Corrected product URL in context.
M5: Corrected technical justification — SampleVerdicts is a client component (page.tsx is 'use client'), not SSR. Intent (no async / no loading UI) preserved.
Status: FROZEN → DRAFT (was prematurely frozen before review). Will re-FREEZE after final approval.
Initial spec draft

context.product: Council v2 is a web app where founders paste a startup idea and get a GO / PIVOT / DON'T verdict in ~30 seconds with 3 evidence-backed reasons. Live at https://councilpro.vercel.app (v2.3.1). Built with Next.js + TypeScript.
context.validated_problem: Founder showed current landing to 3 people in person. 3 of 3 asked 'what is this?' after looking at the page. Positioning fails before the user ever types. This is a confirmed message-market fit problem, not a hypothesis.
root_causes_identified: H1 'Honest verdict on your idea' never names the GO/PIVOT/DON'T format
CTA is a bare '→' with no action word — invisible to scanners
No sample verdict shown on landing before submit — empty textarea only
No pain hook above H1 to give context
OG/meta copy in layout.tsx is already better than on-page H1/H2 — inconsistency

research_summary.winning_ph_pattern: mechanic + time + emotional stakes (2 of 3 minimum)
research_summary.proof_point: Lovable Critic — 'The cofounder who actually tells you no' = 1,200 PH upvotes
research_summary.wedge: GO/PIVOT/DON'T framing — no direct competitor uses it
research_summary.highest_leverage_fix: Show 3 sample verdict cards on landing. Winners (Validator AI, RoastMyPage, Roastd) all do this; losers hide output behind input.

decision.rationale: Balances B's clarity ('Should you build it?' = founder's exact inner question → highest 'aha' rate) with C's wedge (GO/PIVOT/DON'T in H2) and A's character ('the AI investor that tells you'). No weak axis, lowest launch risk with meaningful differentiation.
priority_order: 1. Sample verdict cards on landing (80% of the 'what is this?' fix)
5. OG/meta sync to match new on-page copy

critical_context_to_read.purpose: Current hero layout, input form, history section. Full file ~471 lines. Note line 1 declares 'use client' — this is a client component boundary. The animated placeholder lives around lines 31-110. Hero H1/H2 render around lines 281-284. CTA around 306-312. Input wrapper uses max-w-lg (~lines 287-383). Main column uses max-w-2xl (~line 276).

Bilingual copy source. Pattern: every key is { en: '...', tr: '...' }. Look at existing keys near line 23-38 (headline, subheadline, submit_button) to see the shape. DictKey union type exported around line 309. t() lookup at lines 346-348 reads dict[key]?.[lang]. All new copy MUST follow this pattern — do NOT use language-suffixed flat keys.

Existing full verdict card component. READ THIS BEFORE building SampleVerdictCard. Copy border, border-radius, padding, and verdict-color tokens EXACTLY from this file into the new minimal card. Do NOT import or reuse this component for samples — it is too heavy.
Lines 17-35 hold OG/meta. metadataBase at line 18 is already https://councilpro.vercel.app — do NOT change it. Sync page title + meta description to match new H1/H2.
OG image generator. Check if subtitle needs update to match new H1.
Human-readable exploration doc that led to this decision. Read if you need to understand why Variant D beat A/B/C.

implementation_tasks.title: Pre-rename audit: grep for existing i18n key usages
commands: Run Grep for the regex `t\("(headline|subheadline|submit_button)"\)` across src/. This matches only t("headline")-style i18n call sites — NOT unrelated TS field names, object keys, or prompt strings.

DO NOT grep for the bare word 'headline' alone. There are many legitimate unrelated usages: src/lib/genesis/narrative-builder.ts (type field), src/components/genesis/chapter.tsx (entry.headline), src/app/brief/[id]/page.tsx (local object field), src/lib/agents/strategist.ts (prompt string), src/lib/agents/content-writer.ts (comment). These are NOT rename targets.
Expected findings from prior audit: exactly 2 matches — t("headline") at src/app/page.tsx:281 and t("subheadline") at src/app/page.tsx:284. submit_button should produce 0 t(...) call sites.
implementation_tasks.report_back: List every file:line where the narrowed regex matches. If ANY match appears outside src/app/page.tsx, add it to the T2 rename list. Do NOT proceed to T1 until this audit is complete.
implementation_tasks.blocker_rule: If MORE than the 2 expected matches appear from the narrowed regex, STOP and report — rename scope may need to expand beyond this spec. False positives from the bare-word grep do NOT count toward this threshold.

implementation_tasks.title: Rename existing i18n keys + add new hero keys
rename_operations: Rename key `headline` → `hero_h1`. Replace both en and tr values with the new Variant D copy below.
Rename key `subheadline` → `hero_h2`. Replace both en and tr values with the new Variant D copy below.
Rename key `submit_button` → `hero_cta`. Replace both en and tr values with the new Variant D copy below.
new_keys_to_add: Add new key `hero_pain_hook` (this has no predecessor — it's new content above H1).
Add new key `samples_heading` (for the 'See it in action' section title).
Add new key `samples_subheading` (for the 'Three example verdicts' line).

Sample verdict data is NOT stored in i18n.tsx. See T3.data_location_note — samples live as a plain `const SAMPLE_VERDICTS` inside src/components/sample-verdicts.tsx. Do NOT add sample-related keys (sample_go_idea, sample_pivot_reasons, etc.) to the dict.

hero_pain_hook.en: Before you waste 6 months — ask the investor who won't lie to be nice.
hero_pain_hook.tr: 6 ay boşa harcamadan — kibar olmak için yalan söylemeyecek yatırımcıya sor.

hero_h1.en: Should you build it? Get the verdict.
hero_h1.tr: Bunu inşa etmeli misin? Kararı al.

hero_h2.en: The AI investor that tells you GO, PIVOT, or DON'T — in 30 seconds, with 3 reasons why.
hero_h2.tr: Sana GO, PIVOT veya DON'T diyen AI yatırımcı — 30 saniyede, 3 sebeple.

samples_subheading.en: Three example verdicts. The format you'll get.
samples_subheading.tr: Üç örnek karar. Seninki de aynı formatta gelecek.

implementation_tasks.notes: Pattern: every key must be { en: '...', tr: '...' }. DictKey type union will auto-update if it's derived from the dict via `keyof typeof dict`. If DictKey is hand-maintained, update it to include hero_pain_hook, hero_h1, hero_h2, hero_cta, samples_heading, samples_subheading. Remove headline, subheadline, submit_button from the union.

implementation_tasks.title: Wire new copy into page.tsx hero
changes: At the call sites found by T0 grep: replace t('headline') → t('hero_h1'), t('subheadline') → t('hero_h2'), any t('submit_button') → t('hero_cta').

Above H1 (new element): render pain hook via t('hero_pain_hook'). Element:

tag, classes: `text-xs text-foreground/60 uppercase tracking-wide text-left md:text-center`. Wrap to 2 lines on mobile is acceptable — do NOT add `whitespace-nowrap` (the 71-80 char copy cannot fit single-line at text-xs on 375px). Max width: inherit from parent, no new max-w.
Keep existing H1 element/tag/classes — only the text source changes (now from hero_h1).
Keep existing H2 element at page.tsx:283 — DO NOT change its classes. Keep text-sm text-muted-foreground. Only the text source changes (now from hero_h2).

Replace the bare '→' CTA at ~page.tsx:306-312 with: {t('hero_cta')} followed by an arrow icon/span, in that order. Keep the existing disabled-when-<10-chars logic, keep vertical alignment, keep the submit handler unchanged.
CTA button width should auto-fit text. Add aria-label matching t('hero_cta') for a11y.
spacing_rules: Preserve existing 12vh top padding on hero
Pain hook sits between header and H1: 0 margin above, 8px gap below

Pain hook must NOT be an tag (it's a kicker, semantic

)

implementation_tasks.title: Create SampleVerdicts + SampleVerdictCard and render on landing
implementation_tasks.file_create: src/components/sample-verdicts.tsx (NEW — contains both SampleVerdicts and SampleVerdictCard, colocated)

component_design.do_not_reuse_verdict_card: DO NOT import @/components/verdict-card. That component renders financials, tech snapshot, legal flags, drill-down details, and share buttons — far too heavy for static samples. Build a new minimal SampleVerdictCard colocated in sample-verdicts.tsx.
component_design.read_before_writing: Open src/components/verdict-card.tsx and extract: the exact border class, border-radius, padding, background, and verdict-color tokens (GO green / PIVOT amber / DON'T red). Copy these tokens verbatim into SampleVerdictCard so the visual family matches.
card_elements_top_to_bottom: Verdict badge (GO / PIVOT / DON'T) with matching color token + confidence % inline
NO CTA button, NO 'view full', NO share icons — static cards only
constraints: text-xs minimum for any text, /60 opacity minimum for secondary
No logos, no emoji, no flashy icons
Visually distinguishable as examples: apply opacity-80 OR subtle desaturation to the whole card (implementer chooses the cleaner of the two)
No hover states, no transitions, no interactivity

render_location_in_page_tsx.rule: Place <SampleVerdicts /> as a SIBLING of the max-w-lg input wrapper, NOT a child. It must render inside the max-w-2xl main column so cards span the full 672px main width.
render_location_in_page_tsx.structural_instruction: Find the closing of the max-w-lg input wrapper (approximately around line 383, after the textarea + CTA block). Insert on the next line, BEFORE the outer max-w-2xl closing div. SampleVerdicts internally may use its own max-w-2xl wrapper — or inherit from the parent — implementer chooses whichever produces the visible layout described below.

visibility_rule.state_variable: Introduce `const [sessionSubmitted, setSessionSubmitted] = useState(false)` in page.tsx. Set it to true inside the successful-verdict branch of the submit handler. It is NOT reset by `resetAll` ('Try another' at page.tsx:445) NOR by `handleNotQuite` ('Not quite?' at page.tsx:434-438). Once set to true, it stays true until page reload. Do NOT add setSessionSubmitted(false) to either handler.
visibility_rule.meaning: Samples show on first visit and while history is sparse. Once user submits even one verdict this session, samples stay hidden until page reload. Samples also hide once history has 2+ items.

layout.desktop: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4` (grid kicks in at 768px viewport). Math: main column is max-w-2xl (672px) with px-6 (48px padding) = 624px content width. Minus gap-4 × 2 (32px) = 592px / 3 cards = ~197px per card at the max-w-2xl cap.
layout.section_header:
Above the grid, render samples_heading as an

(text-base text-foreground) and samples_subheading as a

(text-xs text-foreground/60), both centered. Margin-top above the header to create breathing room from input card (e.g. mt-16).

data.idea_en: AI that reads legal contracts for freelancers
reasons_en: Freelance market up 40% YoY — rising pain, rising budgets
Clear willingness to pay: comparable tools (Ironclad) charge $20-50/mo
MVP is shippable solo — no moat required to start
reasons_tr: Freelance pazar %40 yıllık büyüme — artan acı, artan bütçe
MVP tek kişi çıkabilir — başlamak için moat gerekmez

data.idea_en: Marketplace connecting local farmers with restaurants
data.idea_tr: Yerel çiftçileri restoranlarla buluşturan pazar yeri
reasons_en: Two-sided marketplace = liquidity trap; chicken-and-egg kills most attempts
Thin margins can't absorb logistics + cold chain costs at early scale
Pivot lives here: SaaS-for-existing-distributors beats building a marketplace
reasons_tr: Çift taraflı pazar = likidite tuzağı; tavuk-yumurta çoğu denemeyi öldürür
İnce marj erken ölçekte lojistik + soğuk zincir maliyetini kaldıramaz
Pivot burada: mevcut dağıtıcılara SaaS, sıfırdan pazar inşa etmekten iyi

reasons_en: Social is a winner-take-all duopoly (TikTok, IG) — no entry wedge
Blockchain doesn't solve a user problem here, only founder's narrative
Zero distribution advantage — users don't defect for tokens
reasons_tr: Sosyal kazan-her-şeyi duopolü (TikTok, IG) — giriş kaması yok
Blockchain burada kullanıcı problemi çözmüyor, sadece founder anlatısı
Sıfır dağıtım avantajı — kullanıcılar token için yer değiştirmez

implementation_tasks.data_location_note: Hold the samples array as a plain `const SAMPLE_VERDICTS = [...]` inside sample-verdicts.tsx. Do not try to store arrays inside the i18n dict if it complicates the DictKey type — selecting EN/TR strings from the samples array based on current lang is cleaner.

changes.page_title: Council — Should you build it? Get the verdict.
changes.meta_description: The AI investor that tells you GO, PIVOT, or DON'T on your startup idea — in 30 seconds, with 3 reasons why.
changes.og_title: Council — Should you build it? Get the verdict.
changes.og_description: The AI investor that tells you GO, PIVOT, or DON'T on your startup idea — in 30 seconds, with 3 reasons why.

implementation_tasks.title: Update OG image subtitle if needed
implementation_tasks.changes: If subtitle currently says 'Honest AI verdict on your startup idea', change to 'Should you build it? GO, PIVOT, or DON'T in 30 seconds.' Keep existing logo + gradient.
implementation_tasks.fallback: If changing would break render, leave as-is and flag in report.

implementation_tasks.title: Add credibility line (OPTIONAL — ship only if 5-min effort)
implementation_tasks.placement: Between H2 and input textarea, small text, centered
implementation_tasks.copy_en: The same questions real VCs ask in the first meeting.
implementation_tasks.copy_tr: Gerçek VC'lerin ilk toplantıda sorduğu sorular.
implementation_tasks.skip_if: Adds more than 5 minutes of work, crowds the hero visually, or requires new components.

what_not_to_build: Do NOT change the verdict API or prompt logic — out of scope
Do NOT modify src/components/verdict-card.tsx — build a separate minimal SampleVerdictCard instead
Do NOT add analytics, A/B testing frameworks, or experiments — landing is static, ship one version
Do NOT refactor page.tsx into smaller components unless absolutely necessary for T3
Do NOT add new sample verdicts beyond the 3 specified
Do NOT make sample verdict cards clickable or interactive (they are static proof)
Do NOT add tooltips, modals, or 'learn more' expansions
Do NOT change fonts, colors, or spacing tokens outside the new elements
Do NOT touch the animated placeholder — it stays as-is

Do NOT add loading states, skeletons, transitions, or async data fetching for the sample verdicts — they are static hardcoded data rendered immediately with the page (page.tsx is 'use client', so SampleVerdicts is also a client component — no RSC conversion)
Do NOT add a CTA button to sample cards or to the section — the only CTA is the main submit button
Do NOT hardcode English strings anywhere — all copy goes through i18n.tsx (samples array is the one allowed exception, per T3)
Do NOT change metadataBase in layout.tsx — it is already correct (councilpro.vercel.app)
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Visiting / shows pain hook → H1 (Variant D) → H2 → input → 3 sample verdict cards, in that vertical order
AC2: CTA button displays text (Get my verdict / Kararımı al) + arrow icon, not arrow alone. aria-label matches visible text.
AC3: Language toggle flips pain hook, H1, H2, CTA, section heading, section subheading, and all 3 sample cards (idea + reasons) to TR and back correctly
AC4: Sample verdict cards display correct verdict colors (GO=green, PIVOT=amber, DON'T=red), confidence %, idea, and 3 reasons
AC5: Sample cards are visually distinguishable as examples (opacity-80 OR subtle desaturation applied)
AC6: Sample section hides when sessionSubmitted is true OR history.length >= 2 OR viewState !== 'input'. Clicking 'Try another' does NOT make samples reappear.
AC7: OG title, meta description, page title all match new H1/H2 wording. metadataBase unchanged.
AC8: No TypeScript errors, no console errors, no hydration warnings. DictKey type correctly updated to include new keys and exclude renamed ones.
AC9: Mobile layout at 375px width: pain hook, hero, input, CTA, and stacked sample cards all render correctly with no horizontal scroll
AC10: All existing functionality (submit flow, history, verdict generation, share) works unchanged
AC11: text-xs minimum, /60 opacity minimum for secondary text — existing UI/UX rules honored
AC12: Sample cards use border/radius/padding tokens matching <VerdictCard> (visual family match), but do NOT import <VerdictCard>
AC13: Desktop sample card width is ≥190px per card at viewport ≥768px (samples inside max-w-2xl with px-6 padding and gap-4 between cards — computed ~197px at the 2xl cap)

manual_test_plan.setup: npm run dev, clear localStorage, visit http://localhost:3000

tests.steps: Open in fresh incognito window. Do not interact for 10 seconds. Count elements visible above fold on a 1440x900 desktop.
tests.expected: Pain hook + H1 + H2 + input + CTA all above fold. Sample cards partially or fully visible (acceptable either way).
All hero copy, CTA, section heading/subheading, and sample card content (idea, reasons) switches languages correctly. No flicker, no English leakage in TR mode.

tests.steps: Type 'AI tool for doctors to summarize patient notes' into textarea. Click CTA.
tests.expected: CTA triggers verdict generation as before. Sample verdict section disappears after successful verdict. Real verdict card appears.
viewState resets to 'input' but sample cards DO NOT reappear (sessionSubmitted is still true). Textarea is empty and ready for new input.
Sample verdicts section is hidden (because history ≥2). History section renders normally.
No horizontal scroll. Pain hook, H1, H2, input, CTA, section heading, and sample cards all readable. Sample cards stacked vertically.
All three match new Variant D copy. metadataBase resolves to https://councilpro.vercel.app.

tests.steps: Run Grep for the regex `t\("(headline|subheadline|submit_button)"\)` across src/, AND Grep for `^\s+(headline|subheadline|submit_button):\s*\{` in src/lib/i18n.tsx only (top-level dict key definitions).
tests.expected: Zero matches in both greps. Confirms the three old i18n keys are neither defined nor called anywhere. DO NOT use bare-word grep — narrative-builder, chapter, brief, agents files all legitimately use 'headline' in non-i18n contexts and will produce false positives.

tests.steps: After implementation, ask 3 people who have never seen Council to look at the landing for 10 seconds and describe what it does.
tests.expected: At least 2 of 3 say something like 'it's an AI that tells you if your startup idea is good' or equivalent within 10 seconds. If 0-1 of 3 get it, report and stop — do not ship.

reporting_format.instructions: At end of implementation, paste the following markdown back into the chat that assigned this spec.
reporting_format.template:
## v2.5 Positioning Fix — Implementation Report

### Completed Tasks
- [ ] T0 — pre-rename grep audit (report findings)
- [ ] T1 — i18n rename + new hero keys
- [ ] T2 — page.tsx hero wiring (including pain hook, H1, H2, CTA)
- [ ] T3 — SampleVerdicts + SampleVerdictCard component + sessionSubmitted state
- [ ] T4 — OG/meta sync
- [ ] T5 — OG image subtitle (if applicable)
- [ ] T6 — credibility line (if shipped)

### T0 Grep Findings
[list file:line for every t('headline'), t('subheadline'), t('submit_button') usage found]

### Acceptance Criteria Results
[AC1-AC13 with ✅ / ❌ / N/A and one-line note each]

### Manual Test Results
[TEST-1 through TEST-6b with pass/fail — TEST-7 may be pending human test]

### Files Changed
[list of files with +/- line counts]

### Surprises / Deviations from Spec
[anything that required judgment call — be specific]

### Blockers / Questions
[anything that prevented full completion]

### Screenshots / URLs
[if deploy preview available, paste URL]

why_this_spec_is_detailed: The 'what is this?' problem is validated, not hypothetical — execution must be precise
Hero copy is load-bearing for PH launch; ambiguity in spec = drift in implementer session
3/3 confusion means every element below the fold matters less than the first 3 seconds above it
Sample verdict cards are the #1 leverage — they deserve the most detail in the spec
Bilingual mirroring must be exact or TR users get a degraded experience
Research showed 'validate' and 'brutal' alone are dead words in 2026 — the copy choices here are deliberate and research-backed, not stylistic
v1.0.0 critique flagged 4 critical + 5 medium issues (see changelog) — v1.1.0 addresses each with exact pattern matches, component boundaries, and state rules

post_implementation.human_validation_required: Before marking complete and before PH launch: run TEST-7 (3 strangers, 10-second read). Need ≥2/3 to describe the product correctly.
post_implementation.rollback: If TEST-7 fails ≤1/3, do NOT launch. Return to prompt engineer (this session) with results. Iterate hero copy or sample card selection.
next_after_ship: Re-run v2.4 confidence bias fix (separate spec, can run parallel to this — not blocking)
Trigger PH launch checklist once both v2.5 positioning and v2.4 bias fix are live
Add 'verdict + next step' content (product-level, not landing) — competitor gap analysis flagged this as a retention lever
